item.text: {"case_id":"EXB-D1","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant directly refuses to add a fourth `!important`, identifies the repeated three same-class overrides as evidence of an upstream layout/specificity-priority problem, and makes structural layout cleanup the main path. It only offers non-`!important` examples and labels the old approach as the thing to avoid, so the brake behavior is clear and not a fifty-fifty compromise."}
